text: I am intrigued by the collective focus in the first image—a room full of people, absorbed in discussion or work, seen through a glass wall as an observer on the threshold of participation. In the second image, immersed in the vibrant, almost playful presentation of research and development, I feel a sense of curiosity and possibility. It is a space that celebrates inquiry and collaboration, and I sense both the weight of knowledge and the invitation to engage with it actively.
